ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Rate of crime in the vicinity of the property */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Zone identifier for the property */,
  "industrial_proximity" REAL /* Proximity to industrial areas (scale of 0 to 10) */,
  "char_river" TEXT /* Indicator of proximity to the Charles River (Y/N) */,
  "nitrogen_oxide" REAL /* Nitrogen oxide concentration in the area */,
  "num_rooms" REAL /* Average number of rooms in the property */,
  "property_age" REAL /* Age of the property in years */,
  "distance_to_amenities" REAL /* Distance to amenities in miles */,
  "radial" INTEGER /* Radial zone indicator */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Local tax rate for the property */,
  "student_teacher_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of students to teachers */,
  "low_income_stat" REAL /* Low-income status indicator */,
  "median_value" REAL /* Median value of the property */,
  "categorical_median_value" TEXT /* Categorical median value indicator (Yes/No) */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (residential, commercial, etc.) */,
  "listing_status" TEXT /* Current listing status of the property */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of sale for the property */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the zone */,
  "zone_description" TEXT /* Description of the zone’s characteristics */,
  "zone_population" INTEGER /* Population of the zone */,
  "zone_area" REAL /* Geographical area of the zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_statistics" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime record */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Zone identifier where the crime data is collected */,
  "crime_type" TEXT /* Type of crime (e.g., violent, property) */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Rate of the crime in the zone */,
  "crime_date" TEXT /* Date when the crime occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_factors" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental record */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Zone identifier for the associated environmental data */,
  "nitrogen_oxide" REAL /* Nitrogen oxide levels in the zone */,
  "proximity_to_river" TEXT /* Proximity indicator to the Charles River (Y/N) */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Air quality index of the zone */,
  "noise_pollution_level" REAL /* Noise pollution level of the zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_factors_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the property to which the amenity is related */,
  "amenity_type" TEXT /* Type of amenity (e.g., school, park, grocery store) */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance to the amenity in miles */,
  "amenity_rating" REAL /* Rating of the amenity (scale of 1 to 5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_amenities_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_rates" (
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax rate record */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Zone identifier relevant to the tax rate */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Current tax rate applicable in the zone */,
  "tax_year" INTEGER /* Year when the tax rate is applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tax_rates_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_teacher_ratios" (
  "ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ratio record */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Zone identifier where the ratio is calculated */,
  "ratio" REAL /* Ratio of students to teachers */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_teacher_ratios_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_statistics" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income record */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Zone identifier relevant to the income statistics */,
  "low_income_stat" REAL /* Percentage of low-income households */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median household income in the zone */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in the zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_statistics_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property value record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the property being valued */,
  "median_value" REAL /* Median property value based on analysis */,
  "categorical_value" TEXT /* Categorical median value indicator (Yes/No) */,
  "appraisal_date" TEXT /* Date of property appraisal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_values_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., property analysis, market trends) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the property being predicted */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value of the property */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Machine learning model used for the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Machine learning model being evaluated */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Metric used to evaluate model performance (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "performance_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)
